Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **
  Following Saunders Mac Lane & Ieke Moerdijk
  Sheaves in Geometry and Logic - A First Introduction to Topos theory.
  Chapter IV.1 and IV.2

  Contents :
  - definition of elementary topos ([Topos]) as a category which has:
    -) finite limits meaning:
      --) Terminal Object
      --) Binary Pullbacks
    -) Power Object
    -) Subobject Classifier
  - definition of the [KroneckerDelta] predicate and the [SingletonArrow]
  - proof that [SingletonArrow] is monic ([SingletonArrow_isMonic])
  - derivation of exponentials [Exponentials_from_Topos]
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.SubobjectClassifier.SubobjectClassifier.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PowerObject.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Coreflections.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subobjects.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.MonoEpiIso.

Local Open Scope cat.

(*
An elementary topos is a category which has:
  -) finite limits meaning:
    --) Terminal Object
    --) Binary Pullbacks
  -) Power Object
  -) Subobject Classifier
*)

Definition Topos_Structure (C : category) :=
  ∑ (PB : Pullbacks C) (T : Terminal C) (Ω : subobject_classifier T),
    (PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω).

Definition Topos := ∑ (C:category), Topos_Structure C.


C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
Ω: subobject_classifier T
P: PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω
Topos_Structure C


C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
Ω: subobject_classifier T
P: PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω
Topos_Structure C

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
Ω: subobject_classifier T
P: PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω
∑ (T : Terminal C) (Ω : subobject_classifier T),
PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
Ω: subobject_classifier T
P: PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω
∑ Ω : subobject_classifier T,
PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω

  
C: category
PB: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
Ω: subobject_classifier T
P: PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω
PowerObject (BinProductsFromPullbacks PB T) Ω

  exact P.
Defined.


C: category
str: Topos_Structure C
Topos


C: category
str: Topos_Structure C
Topos

  
C: category
str: Topos_Structure C
Topos_Structure C

  exact str.
Defined.

Section ToposAccessor.

Context (C : Topos).

Definition Topos_category : category := pr1 C.
Definition Topos_Pullbacks : Pullbacks Topos_category := pr1 (pr2 C).
Definition Topos_Terminal : Terminal Topos_category := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 C)).
Definition Topos_SubobjectClassifier : subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal) := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 C))).
Definition Topos_BinProducts : BinProducts Topos_category := BinProductsFromPullbacks (Topos_Pullbacks) (Topos_Terminal).
Definition Topos_PowerObject : PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts) (Topos_SubobjectClassifier) := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 C))).

End ToposAccessor.

Coercion Topos_category : Topos >->category.

Section Topos.

Context {C:Topos}.
Let T := Topos_Terminal C.
Let PB := Topos_Pullbacks C.
Let BinProd := Topos_BinProducts C.
Let P := Topos_PowerObject C.
Let Ω := Topos_SubobjectClassifier C.
Local Notation "c ⨉ d"
  := (BinProductObject C (BinProd c d))(at level 5).
  (*\bigtimes*)
Local Notation "f ⨱ g"
  := (BinProductOfArrows _ (BinProd _ _) (BinProd _ _) f g) (at level 10).
  (*\timesbar*)

Section KroneckerDelta.
(*The [KroneckerDelta] predicate is defined as
the chraracteristic morphis of the [diagonalMap],
The [SingletonArrow] is defined as
the [PowerObject_transpose] of the [KroneckerDelta]*)


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C ⟦ BinProd B B, Ω ⟧


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C ⟦ BinProd B B, Ω ⟧

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
Monic C ?X (BinProd B B)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

C
 exact B.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
Monic C B (BinProd B B)
 use diagonalMap.
Defined.

Identifier 'δ' now a keyword



C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

C ⟦ B, PowerObject_on_ob P B ⟧

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C ⟦ Topos_BinProducts C B B,
Topos_SubobjectClassifier C ⟧

  use KroneckerDelta.
Defined.
Local Notation "'{⋅}' B" := (SingletonArrow B)(at level 8).

(*Proof that [SingletonArrow] is Monic and
  definition of his characteristic map [SingletonPred]*)


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b) (diagonalMap BinProd B)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X)
· (identity B) ⨱ b = b · diagonalMap BinProd B
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X)
· (identity B) ⨱ b = b · diagonalMap' BinProd B

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) (b · identity B)
  (identity X · b) = b · diagonalMap' BinProd B

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b · diagonalMap' BinProd B =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) (b · identity B)
  (identity X · b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b · diagonalMap' BinProd B
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B) = b · identity B
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b · diagonalMap' BinProd B
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B) = 
identity X · b

· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B) = b · identity B
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b
· (diagonalMap' BinProd B
   · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)) = b · identity B

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b
· (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) (identity B)
     (identity B) · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)) =
b · identity B

      now rewrite BinProductPr1Commutes.
    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b · diagonalMap' BinProd B
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B) = identity X · b
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b
· (diagonalMap' BinProd B
   · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)) = identity X · b

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
b
· (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) (identity B)
     (identity B) · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)) =
identity X · b

      now rewrite BinProductPr2Commutes, id_left, id_right.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
isPullback
  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ X, BinProd B B ⟧)
     (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X)
      · (identity B) ⨱ b)
     (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) (b · identity B)
        (identity X · b))
     (λ p : C ⟦ X, BinProd B B ⟧,
      p = b · diagonalMap' BinProd B)
     (! BinProductArrowUnique C B B (BinProd B B) X
          (b · identity B) (identity X · b)
          (b · diagonalMap' BinProd B)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ X, B ⟧)
             (b · diagonalMap' BinProd B
              · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
             (b
              · (diagonalMap' BinProd B
                 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)))
             (λ p : C ⟦ X, B ⟧, p = b · identity B)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ B, B ⟧)
                (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B)
                   (identity B) (identity B)
                 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
                (identity B)
                (λ p : C ⟦ B, B ⟧,
                 b · p = b · identity B)
                (idpath (b · identity B))
                (BinProductPr1Commutes C B B
                   (BinProd B B) B (identity B)
                   (identity B))
              :
              b
              · (diagonalMap' BinProd B
                 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)) =
              b · identity B)
             (assoc' b (diagonalMap' BinProd B)
                (BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))))
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ X, B ⟧)
             (b · diagonalMap' BinProd B
              · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B))
             (b
              · (diagonalMap' BinProd B
                 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)))
             (λ p : C ⟦ X, B ⟧, p = identity X · b)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ B, B ⟧)
                (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B)
                   (identity B) (identity B)
                 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B))
                (identity B)
                (λ p : C ⟦ B, B ⟧,
                 b · p = identity X · b)
                (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ X, B ⟧)
                   (identity X · b) b
                   (λ p : C ⟦ X, B ⟧,
                    b · identity B = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ X, B ⟧)
                      (b · identity B) b
                      (λ p : C ⟦ X, B ⟧, p = b)
                      (idpath b) (id_right b))
                   (id_left b))
                (BinProductPr2Commutes C B B
                   (BinProd B B) B (identity B)
                   (identity B))
              :
              b
              · (diagonalMap' BinProd B
                 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)) =
              identity X · b)
             (assoc' b (diagonalMap' BinProd B)
                (BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)))))
     (postcompWithBinProductArrow C (BinProd B B)
        (BinProd B X) (identity B) b b (identity X))
   :
   BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X)
   · (identity B) ⨱ b = b · diagonalMap BinProd B)
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, BinProd B X ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, B ⟧),
h · (identity B) ⨱ b = k · diagonalMap BinProd B
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, X ⟧,
  hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
  h × hk · b = k

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    (* rewrite (BinProductArrowEta _ _ _ _ _ y1). *)
    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: (λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
  (y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b) =
(λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
  (y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B)
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: (λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
  (y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b) =
(λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B))
  (y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B)
r2: (λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B))
  (y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b) =
(λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B))
  (y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B)
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B) =
y2 · diagonalMap' BinProd B
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)
r2: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B) =
y2 · diagonalMap' BinProd B
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B) =
y2
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) 
    (identity B) (identity B)
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B B)
r2: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B) =
y2
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) 
    (identity B) (identity B)
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y2
r2: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B) =
y2
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B B) 
    (identity B) (identity B)
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B B)
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y2
r2: y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) · b = y2
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) · b = y2
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
∃! hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
∑ hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
∏
t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
    hk
    · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
    y1 × hk · b = y2, t = ?x

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
∑ hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y12 · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × y12 · b = y2

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y12 · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
  (y12 · identity X) = y1

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y1 =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
  (y12 · identity X)

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y12 · b
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = y12 · identity X

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y12 · b
 now rewrite r2, <-r1.
      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = y12 · identity X
 now rewrite id_right.
    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
∏
t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
    hk
    · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
    y1 × hk · b = y2,
t =
y12,,
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧)
  (y12
   · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
     (y12 · identity X))
  (λ p : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧, p = y1)
  (! BinProductArrowUnique C B X (BinProd B X) Y
       (y12 · b) (y12 · identity X) y1
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) (y12 · b) y2
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) y11
             (λ y2 : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y2)
             (idpath y11) y2 r1) r2)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, X ⟧)
          (y12 · identity X) y12
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (idpath y12) (id_right y12)))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
     (identity X) y12),, r2
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
hk
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
y1 × hk · b = y2
t =
y12,,
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧)
  (y12
   · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
     (y12 · identity X))
  (λ p : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧, p = y1)
  (! BinProductArrowUnique C B X (BinProd B X) Y
       (y12 · b) (y12 · identity X) y1
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) (y12 · b) y2
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) y11
             (λ y2 : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y2)
             (idpath y11) y2 r1) r2)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, X ⟧)
          (y12 · identity X) y12
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (idpath y12) (id_right y12)))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
     (identity X) y12),, r2

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
t,, tri1,, tri2 =
y12,,
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧)
  (y12
   · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
     (y12 · identity X))
  (λ p : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧, p = y1)
  (! BinProductArrowUnique C B X (BinProd B X) Y
       (y12 · b) (y12 · identity X) y1
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) (y12 · b) y2
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) y11
             (λ y2 : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = y2)
             (idpath y11) y2 r1) r2)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, X ⟧)
          (y12 · identity X) y12
          (λ p : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
           y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = p)
          (idpath y12) (id_right y12)))
  (precompWithBinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
     (identity X) y12),, r2

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
   x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1 × x · b = y2)
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
pr1 (t,, tri1,, tri2) =
pr1
  (y12,,
   internal_paths_rew_r 
     (C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧)
     (y12
      · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X))
     (BinProductArrow C 
        (BinProd B X) (y12 · b) 
        (y12 · identity X))
     (λ p : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧, p = y1)
     (! BinProductArrowUnique C B X 
          (BinProd B X) Y 
          (y12 · b) (y12 · identity X) y1
          (internal_paths_rew_r 
             (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) 
             (y12 · b) y2
             (λ p : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = p)
             (internal_paths_rew 
                (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) y11
                (λ y2 : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
                 y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) =
                 y2) (idpath y11) y2 r1) r2)
          (internal_paths_rew_r 
             (C ⟦ Y, X ⟧) 
             (y12 · identity X) y12
             (λ p : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = p)
             (idpath y12) 
             (id_right y12)))
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C 
        (BinProd B X) b 
        (identity X) y12),, r2)

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
   x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1 × x · b = y2)
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
∏ x : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
isaprop
  (x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1 × x · b = y2)

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
x: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
isaprop
  (x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1 × x · b = y2)

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
x: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1)
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
x: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (x · b = y2)

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
x: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (x · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X) =
   y1)
 use homset_property. 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
x: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (x · b = y2)
 use homset_property.
      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
pr1 (t,, tri1,, tri2) =
pr1
  (y12,,
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧)
     (y12
      · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X))
     (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) (y12 · b)
        (y12 · identity X))
     (λ p : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧, p = y1)
     (! BinProductArrowUnique C B X (BinProd B X) Y
          (y12 · b) (y12 · identity X) y1
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) (y12 · b)
             y2
             (λ p : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) = p)
             (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ Y, B ⟧) y11
                (λ y2 : C ⟦ Y, B ⟧,
                 y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) =
                 y2) (idpath y11) y2 r1) r2)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ Y, X ⟧)
             (y12 · identity X) y12
             (λ p : C ⟦ Y, X ⟧,
              y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) = p)
             (idpath y12) (id_right y12)))
     (precompWithBinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
        (identity X) y12),, r2)
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
t = y12

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
Ts: (λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X))
  (t
   · BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
       (identity X)) =
(λ f : C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X)) y1
t = y12

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
Ts: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) =
y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X)
t = y12

        
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
X, B: C
b: C ⟦ X, B ⟧
Y: C
y1: C ⟦ Y, BinProd B X ⟧
y2: C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
r: y1 · (identity B) ⨱ b = y2 · diagonalMap BinProd B
y11:= y1 · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, B ⟧
y12:= y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X): C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
r1: y11 = y2
r2: y12 · b = y2
t: C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
tri1: t
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) = y1
tri2: t · b = y2
Ts: t = y1 · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X)
t = y12

        exact Ts.
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
isMonic {⋅} B


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
isMonic {⋅} B

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
∏ (x : C) (g h : C ⟦ x, B ⟧),
g · {⋅} B = h · {⋅} B → g = h

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
(identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
b = b'
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
(identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
(identity B) ⨱ b
· (BinProductOfArrows C
     (Topos_BinProducts C B (PowerObject_on_ob P B))
     (Topos_BinProducts C B B) (identity B)
     (PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
   · PowerObject_inPred P B) =
(identity B) ⨱ b'
· (BinProductOfArrows C
     (Topos_BinProducts C B (PowerObject_on_ob P B))
     (Topos_BinProducts C B B) (identity B)
     (PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
   · PowerObject_inPred P B)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
(identity B) ⨱ b
· ((identity B) ⨱ (PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
   · PowerObject_inPred P B) =
(identity B) ⨱ b'
· ((identity B) ⨱ (PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
   · PowerObject_inPred P B)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
(identity B) ⨱ (b · PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
· PowerObject_inPred P B =
(identity B) ⨱ (b' · PowerObject_transpose P δ B)
· PowerObject_inPred P B

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
b · PowerObject_transpose P δ B =
b' · PowerObject_transpose P δ B

    exact p.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
b = b'

  (** Consider this diagram
    <<
                        b               !
                X   -------->   B   --------> T
                |               |             |
         b x id |    diagonalMap|             | true
                v               v             v
              B x X --------> B x B --------> Ω
                    id x b              δB
    >>
    We prove the left-hand square is a pullback
      (even when we substitue b with b') in [pbl] and [pbl'],
    the right-hand square is the definition of [KroneckerDelta]
      and it is a Pullback,
    so the whole rectangle is a pullback ([pb] [pb'])

    using [q] we note b x id and b' x id are [pullbackPr1]
    of the same diagram, thus they differ by an isomorphism [h]
  *)
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback
  ((identity B) ⨱ b
   · characteristic_morphism Ω
       (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback
  ((identity B) ⨱ b
   · characteristic_morphism Ω
       (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback
  ((identity B) ⨱ b'
   · characteristic_morphism Ω
       (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= ?Goal: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
b = b'
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω

    exact pb.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso pb' pb''
h_tri1: h · PullbackPr1 pb'' = PullbackPr1 pb'
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: h
· BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b
    (identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: (λ f : C ⟦ X, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
     (h · b) (h · identity X)) =
(λ f : C ⟦ X, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
     (identity X))
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X)
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd B X)
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: h · b = b'
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: h · b = b'
h_tri12: (λ f : C ⟦ X, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
     (h · b) (h · identity X)) =
(λ f : C ⟦ X, BinProd B X ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X))
  (BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
     (identity X))
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: h · b = b'
h_tri12: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X)
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 C (BinProd B X)
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: h · b = b'
h_tri12: h = identity X
b = b'

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B, X: C
b, b': C ⟦ X, B ⟧
p: b · {⋅} B = b' · {⋅} B
q: (identity B) ⨱ b · δ B = (identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B
pbr:= subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (diagonalMap BinProd B): Pullback
  (characteristic_morphism Ω
     (diagonalMap BinProd B)) Ω
pbl:= auxpb b: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b)
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pbl':= auxpb b': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b')
  (diagonalMap BinProd B)
pb:= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b · δ B) Ω
pb':= pullback_glue_pullback C pbr pbl': Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
pb'':= Pullback_mor_paths q (idpath Ω) pb: Pullback ((identity B) ⨱ b' · δ B) Ω
h: z_iso X X
h_tri1: BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) 
  (h · b) (h · identity X) =
BinProductArrow C (BinProd B X) b'
  (identity X)
h_tri2: h · PullbackPr2 pb'' = PullbackPr2 pb'
h_tri11: b = b'
h_tri12: h = identity X
b = b'

  exact h_tri11.
Defined.

Definition SingletonArrow_Monic (B: C) := make_Monic C (SingletonArrow B) (SingletonArrow_isMonic B).


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P B, Ω ⟧


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P B, Ω ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
Monic C ?X (PowerObject_on_ob P B)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
C
 exact B. 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
B: C
Monic C B (PowerObject_on_ob P B)

  use SingletonArrow_Monic.
Defined.
End KroneckerDelta.

(*In this section we show that an elementary topos has exponentials*)
Section Exponentials.


Identifier 'δ' now a keyword

Local Notation "'{⋅}' B" := (SingletonArrow B)(at level 8).

(*[v b c] in Sets would be, given an element x of b and a relation as a subset of c x b, the subset of c of all the element in relation with x*)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
b, c: C
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
b, c: C
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
b, c: C
C
⟦ Topos_BinProducts C c
    (BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))),
Topos_SubobjectClassifier C ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
b, c: C
C
⟦ BinProd (BinProd c b)
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
Topos_SubobjectClassifier C ⟧

  use PowerObject_inPred.
Defined.

(*[u b c] in Sets would be, given a relation as a subset of c x b, the subset of b of all the element x such that (v b c) x is a Singleton*)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
b, c: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
b, c: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
