T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
b, c: C
C
⟦ Topos_BinProducts C b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
Topos_SubobjectClassifier C ⟧

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

C
⟦ Topos_BinProducts C b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
b, c: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P c, 
Topos_SubobjectClassifier C ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

C
⟦ Topos_BinProducts C b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),

 use v.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
b, c: C
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P c, Topos_SubobjectClassifier C
⟧
 use SingletonPred.
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
b: C
C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
b: C
C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
b: C
Sets.pr1hSet
  (Core.contra_homSet_functor
     (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C) b)

  exact (TerminalArrow T b · true Ω).
Defined.

(*we are going to use [coreflections_to_is_left_adjoint], so, given (b c : C) we set up:
  Subobject_dom G0  (the object c^b : C)
  ev                (the evaluation morphism : C ⟦ b x c^b , c ⟧
  universality      (a proof which show e b c is universal)
*)

(*G0 is defined as the pullback of name_true through u*)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
b, c: C
Subobjectscategory (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

 use u.
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
Subobject_mor (G0 b c) · u b c =
TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)) · name_true b


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
Subobject_mor (G0 b c) · u b c =
TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)) · name_true b

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
PullbackPr1
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))))
· u b c =
TerminalArrow T
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))))
· PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
    (PullbackPr1
       (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
          (Topos_Terminal C)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
             (Topos_Terminal C)))
     · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
     · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
PullbackPr2
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))))
· PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
    (PullbackPr1
       (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
          (Topos_Terminal C)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
             (Topos_Terminal C)))
     · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
     · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)) =
TerminalArrow T
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))))
· PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
    (PullbackPr1
       (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
          (Topos_Terminal C)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
          (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
             (Topos_Terminal C)))
     · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
     · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
PullbackPr2
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)))) =
TerminalArrow T
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P
        (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) c b
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c)
           (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b))) T
     (u b c)
     (PowerObject_nt_data P (Topos_Terminal C,, b)
        (PullbackPr1
           (Topos_Pullbacks C (Topos_Terminal C) b
              (Topos_Terminal C)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) b)
              (TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C)
                 (Topos_Terminal C)))
         · (TerminalArrow T b · true' Ω)
         · identity (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C))))

  use TerminalArrowUnique.
Qed.

(** Consider this diagram
  <<
                                      ev
              ----------------------------------------------------
              |                                                  |
              |      id x G0                  v           {·}    v
            b x c^b --------> b x P(c x b) ------> Pc <--------- C
              |                 |                   |            |
       id x ! |          id x u |      SingletonPred|            |!
              v                 v                   v            v
            b x T   -------->   b x Pb -----------> Ω <--------- T
              |   id x name_true            inmap          true  ʌ
              |                                                  |
              ----------------------------------------------------
                                    !
  >>
  The left-hand square is b x (def of c^b),
  the middle square is the definition of v from u,
  the right-hand square is the definition of SingletonPred and it is a Pullback,
  the bottom distorted square is the definition of name_true.
  Every square commutes.
  We define [ev] as the [PullbackArrow] of the right-hand square
 *)


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c
· characteristic_morphism Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c
· characteristic_morphism Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

· (v b c

· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

· characteristic_morphism Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c) =

      use (PowerObject_transpose_tri P). 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
· ((identity b) ⨱ (u b c) · PowerObject_inPred P b) =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c) · u b c)
· PowerObject_inPred P b =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b)

  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c))
   · name_true b) · PowerObject_inPred P b =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

· (TerminalArrow T b · Ω) =

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C

· TerminalArrow T b · Ω =

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
BinProductPr1 C
  (Topos_BinProducts C b (Topos_Terminal C))
· TerminalArrow T b = TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T)

    use TerminalArrowUnique.
Qed.

             (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))),
subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
  (SingletonArrow_Monic c) ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
C
⟦ BinProd b
    (Subobject_dom
       (G0 b
          (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
             (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

?h
· characteristic_morphism Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
?k · Ω

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

v:= λ b c : C,

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

⟦ BinProd b
    (Subobject_dom
       (G0 b
          (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
             (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))),

 exact ((identity _) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · (v b c)).

  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

C
⟦ BinProd b
    (Subobject_dom
       (G0 b
          (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
             (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))),

      (TerminalArrow T _)).
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
b, c: C
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c
· characteristic_morphism Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
(identity b)
⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
· TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T) · Ω
 apply ev_aux.
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
b, c: C
ev b c · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
b, c: C
ev b c · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c

  use (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω (SingletonArrow_Monic c))).
Qed.

(*UNIVERSALITY
  Given f : C ⟦ b x a , c ⟧ we need to show
  there is a unique g : C ⟦ a , c^b ⟧ such that f = (id x g)·ev

  we define such g as the [PullbackArrow] the following diagram
  <<
                          !
                c^b -------------> T
                 |                 |
              G0 |                 | name_true
         h       v                 v
      a --->P (c x b) ----------> Pb
                        u b c
  >>
  where h is the transpose of ((id c) x f)·(δ c)
    but as a morphism C ⟦ (c x b) x a , Ω ⟧
    (so we need to precompose [BinProduct_assoc])
*)
Let h {c b a : C} (f: C ⟦ b ⨉ a, c ⟧)
    := PowerObject_transpose P ((z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)) ·
                                  (identity c) ⨱ f · (δ c)).


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
hset_z_iso_equiv (HomP P (BinProd b a,, c))
  (HomxO (BinProd b a,, c))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
     (BinProd b a,, c)) (f · SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
hset_z_iso_equiv (HomP P (BinProd b a,, c))
  (HomxO (BinProd b a,, c))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
     (BinProd b a,, c)) ((identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C c (PowerObject_on_ob P c))
  (Topos_BinProducts C c (BinProd b a)) (identity c)
  (f · {⋅} c) · PowerObject_inPred P c =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C c (PowerObject_on_ob P c))
  (Topos_BinProducts C c (BinProd b a)) (identity c)
  ((identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c)
· PowerObject_inPred P c
 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ (f · {⋅} c) · PowerObject_inPred P c =
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c)
· PowerObject_inPred P c

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b

G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ f
· ((identity c) ⨱ {⋅} c · PowerObject_inPred P c) =
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· ((identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c)

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
δ c = (identity c) ⨱ {⋅} c · PowerObject_inPred P c

    use PowerObject_transpose_tri. 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c =
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· ((identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· ((identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c) =
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· ((identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c) =
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))

· (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

     (BinProd b

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c) ⨱ (v b c) · PowerObject_inPred P c

    use (PowerObject_transpose_tri P). 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)) =
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (h f))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b)) ⨱ (h f)
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b)) ⨱ (h f)
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧

   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧

(identity c) ⨱ f · δ c =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a
· (((identity c) ⨱ (identity b)) ⨱ (h f)
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
· ((identity c) ⨱ f · δ c) =
((identity c) ⨱ (identity b)) ⨱ (h f)
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
· (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c =
((identity c) ⨱ (identity b)) ⨱ (h f)
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
· (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c =
(identity (BinProd c b)) ⨱ (h f)
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

  use PowerObject_transpose_tri.
Qed.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
h f · u b c =
TerminalArrow T a
· Subobject_mor
    (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
       (global_element_isMonic T
          (PowerObject_on_ob P b) (name_true b)))


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
h f · u b c =
TerminalArrow T a
· Subobject_mor
    (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
       (global_element_isMonic T
          (PowerObject_on_ob P b) (name_true b)))

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧

Subobject_mor
  (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T (PowerObject_on_ob P b)

  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b

           (G0 b

  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧

Subobject_mor
  (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
        (name_true b)))
 apply idpath.

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
hset_z_iso_equiv (HomP P (a,, b)) (HomxO (a,, b))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)) (a,, b))
  (h f · u b c) =
hset_z_iso_equiv (HomP P (a,, b)) (HomxO (a,, b))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)) (a,, b))
  (TerminalArrow T a · name_true b)

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (λ (a : C)
