          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C b (PowerObject_on_ob P b))
  (Topos_BinProducts C b a) (identity b) (h f · u b c)
· PowerObject_inPred P b =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C b (PowerObject_on_ob P b))
  (Topos_BinProducts C b a) (identity b)
  (TerminalArrow T a · name_true b)
· PowerObject_inPred P b

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (h f · u b c) · PowerObject_inPred P b =
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a · name_true b)
· PowerObject_inPred P b

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (h f)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (u b c) · PowerObject_inPred P b) =
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (name_true b)
   · PowerObject_inPred P b)

      use PowerObject_transpose_tri.

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b)

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · (v b c · SingletonPred c) =
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (name_true b)
   · PowerObject_inPred P b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (name_true b)
   · PowerObject_inPred P b) =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · (v b c · SingletonPred c)

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b

PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (name_true b)
   · PowerObject_inPred P b) =
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· (BinProductPr1 C (BinProd b T)
   · (TerminalArrow T b · Ω))

· (TerminalArrow T b · Ω)

  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,

· (BinProductPr1 C (BinProd b T)
   · (TerminalArrow T b · Ω)) =

  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c · SingletonPred c =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · (v b c · SingletonPred c)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· (BinProductPr1 C (BinProd b T)
   · (TerminalArrow T b · Ω)) =
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c · SingletonPred c

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd b T) · TerminalArrow T b
· Ω = f · TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c · Ω

      
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
(identity b) ⨱ (TerminalArrow T a)
· BinProductPr1 C (BinProd b T) · TerminalArrow T b =
f · TerminalArrow (Topos_Terminal C) c

      use TerminalArrowEq. 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c · SingletonPred c =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · (v b c · SingletonPred c)

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (h f) · v b c

    use h_sq.
Qed.

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
?h · u b c =
?k
· Subobject_mor
    (Subobjectscategory_ob 
       (name_true b)
       (global_element_isMonic T
          (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
          (name_true b)))

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b

                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)

      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
 exact (h f).

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

     (name_true b)

     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))

   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow

     (BinProd b

   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧

f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
C ⟦ a,
Subobject_dom
  (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
        (name_true b))) ⟧
 use TerminalArrow.
  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
h f · u b c =
TerminalArrow T a
· Subobject_mor
    (Subobjectscategory_ob (name_true b)
       (global_element_isMonic T
          (PowerObject_on_ob P b) (name_true b)))
 apply g_aux.
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
g c b a f · Subobject_mor (G0 b c) = h f


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
g c b a f · Subobject_mor (G0 b c) = h f

  use PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
Qed.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
f = (identity b) ⨱ (g c b a f) · ev b c


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
f = (identity b) ⨱ (g c b a f) · ev b c

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
c, b, a: C
f: C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
f · SingletonArrow_Monic c =
(identity b) ⨱ (g c b a f) · ev b c
· SingletonArrow_Monic c

  now rewrite !assoc',
    ev_tri,
    !assoc,
    BinProductOfArrows_idxcomp,
    h_tri,
    h_sq.
Qed.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))

     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b ?c, c ⟧

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
C
 exact (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)).

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
C
⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
    (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
 exact (ev b c).
Defined.


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
is_coreflection (exp_coreflection_data b c)


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
is_coreflection (exp_coreflection_data b c)

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
∃! g : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
       coreflection_data_object
         (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧,
f =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b) g
· exp_coreflection_data b c

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C

Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
(f
 :
 C
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
     (coreflection_data_object f), c ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b) ?g
· exp_coreflection_data b c

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
∏
g' : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
     coreflection_data_object
       (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧,
(f
 :
 C
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
     (coreflection_data_object f), c ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b) g'
· exp_coreflection_data b c → 
g' = ?g

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
 exact (g c b _ f).

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
(f
 :
 C
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
     (coreflection_data_object f), c ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
  (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f)
· exp_coreflection_data b c
 use g_tri.

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

PullbackSubobject PB

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

let p := idpath c in

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
∏
g' : C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
     coreflection_data_object
       (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧,
(f
 :
 C
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
     (coreflection_data_object f), c ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b) g'
· exp_coreflection_data b c
→ g' = g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
