        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': (f
 :
 C
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b
     (coreflection_data_object f), c ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 BinProd b) g'
· exp_coreflection_data b c
g' = g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C BinProd
  (constant_functor C C b)
  (functor_identity C)
  (coreflection_data_object f)
  (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)) g' · 
ev b c
g' = g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f =
(# (constant_functor C C b) g')
⨱ (# (functor_identity C) g') · 
ev b c
g' = g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f

   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c) =
g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
· Subobject_Monic (G0 b c)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
hset_z_iso_equiv
  (HomP P (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (HomxO (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
     (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c)) =
hset_z_iso_equiv
  (HomP P (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (HomxO (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
     (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
  (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),

        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(pr1
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
      (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b)),,
 hset_z_iso_is_equiv
   (HomP P (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
   (HomxO (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
      (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b)))
  (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c)) =
(pr1
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
      (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b)),,
 hset_z_iso_is_equiv
   (HomP P (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
   (HomxO (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b))
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (nat_z_iso_inv (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P))
      (coreflection_data_object f,, BinProd c b)))
  (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C (BinProd c b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)))
  (Topos_BinProducts C (BinProd c b)
     (coreflection_data_object f))
  (identity (BinProd c b))
  (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (Topos_BinProducts C (BinProd c b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)))
  (Topos_BinProducts C (BinProd c b)
     (coreflection_data_object f))
  (identity (BinProd c b))
  (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity (BinProd c b))
⨱ (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity (BinProd c b))
⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)

f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
⨱ (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)

→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧

BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
     · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T

  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧

(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
     · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

PowerObject_transpose P

C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),

coreflection_data_object

⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

PowerObject_transpose P

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

let p := idpath c in

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),

  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))

      · v b c)

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))

        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a

  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))

⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω

     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)) =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g' · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))

      use (BinProduct_OfArrows_assoc BinProd). 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
     · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
     · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b)
   ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
      · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)) =
BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
  (coreflection_data_object f)
· ((identity c) ⨱ (identity b))
  ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
     · Subobject_Monic (G0 b c))

      use (BinProduct_OfArrows_assoc BinProd). 
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b)
   ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
      · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b) =
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
    (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
· PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b)
   ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
      · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)) =
(identity c)
⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
· (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
hset_z_iso_equiv
  (HomxO (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  (HomP P (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
     (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b)
      ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
         · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))) =
hset_z_iso_equiv
  (HomxO (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  (HomP P (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
     (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(pr1
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)),,
 hset_z_iso_is_equiv
   (HomxO (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
   (HomP P
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)))
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b)
      ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
         · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))) =
(pr1
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)),,
 hset_z_iso_is_equiv
   (HomxO (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
   (HomP P
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c))
   (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
      (PowerObject_nat_z_iso P)
      (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)))
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
PowerObject_nt_data P
  (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b)
      ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
         · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))) =
PowerObject_nt_data P
  (BinProd b (coreflection_data_object f),, c)
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)))

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
PowerObject_transpose P
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b)
      ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
         · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))) =
PowerObject_transpose P
  ((identity c)
   ⨱ ((identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)))
   · (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
        (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
      · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)))

PowerObject_transpose P

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),

  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))

      · v b c)

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))

        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a

  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity b)
⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
· PowerObject_transpose P
    (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
       (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))

· PowerObject_transpose P
    (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

     · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b))

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b

   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧

G0:= λ b c : C,

     (name_true b)

        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b)))

  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity b)
⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f
   · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c =
(identity b) ⨱ (g' · Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c

b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity b) ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f)
· ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c) =
(identity b) ⨱ g'
· ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c)) · v b c)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity b) ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f)
· (ev b c · SingletonArrow_Monic c) =
(identity b) ⨱ g' · (ev b c · SingletonArrow_Monic c)

    
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
(identity b) ⨱ (g c b (coreflection_data_object f) f)
· ev b c · SingletonArrow_Monic c =

PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

        (name_true b)))

  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),

        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))

        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b

      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))

C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧

PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T

           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a

  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧

T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C

  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)

v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,

PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
