PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b, c: C
f: coreflection_data c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
g': C ⟦ coreflection_data_object f,
coreflection_data_object
  (exp_coreflection_data b c) ⟧
g_tri': f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c
f = (identity b) ⨱ g' · ev b c

    use g_tri'.
Defined.

Local Definition exp_coreflection
  (b c : C)
  : coreflection c (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)
  := make_coreflection _ (universality b c).


C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
Exponentials BinProd

   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,

→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧

        (Subobjectscategory_ob

           (global_element_isMonic T

C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b: C
is_exponentiable BinProd b

  
C: Topos
T:= Topos_Terminal C: Terminal C
PB:= Topos_Pullbacks C: Pullbacks C
BinProd:= Topos_BinProducts C: BinProducts C
P:= Topos_PowerObject C: PowerObject (Topos_BinProducts C)
  (Topos_SubobjectClassifier C)
Ω:= Topos_SubobjectClassifier C: subobject_classifier (Topos_Terminal C)
v:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P
  (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
   · PowerObject_inPred P (BinProd c b)): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b)),
PowerObject_on_ob P c ⟧
u:= λ b c : C,
PowerObject_transpose P (v b c · SingletonPred c): ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b),
PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
name_true:= λ b : C,
PowerObject_charname_nat_z_iso P b
  (TerminalArrow T b · Ω): ∏ b : C, C ⟦ T, PowerObject_on_ob P b ⟧
G0:= λ b c : C,
PullbackSubobject PB
  (Subobjectscategory_ob 
     (name_true b)
     (global_element_isMonic T
        (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
        (name_true b))) 
  (u b c): ∏ b c : C,
Subobjectscategory
  (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
ev:= λ b c : C,
let p := idpath c in
paths_rect C
  (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
     (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
  (λ (a : C)
   (_ : subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
          (SingletonArrow_Monic c) = a),
   C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b a)), a ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow
     (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
        (SingletonArrow_Monic c))
     (BinProd b
        (Subobject_dom
           (G0 b
              (subobject_classifier_pullback Ω
                 (SingletonArrow_Monic c)))))
     ((identity b) ⨱ (Subobject_mor (G0 b c))
      · v b c)
     ((identity b)
      ⨱ (TerminalArrow T (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)))
      · TerminalArrow T (BinProd b T))
     (ev_aux b c)) c p: ∏ b c : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b (Subobject_dom (G0 b c)), c ⟧
h:= λ (c b a : C) (f : C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PowerObject_transpose P
  (z_iso_inv (BinProduct_assoc BinProd c b a)
   · (identity c) ⨱ f · δ c): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b) ⟧
g:= λ (c b a : C)
(f : C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧),
PullbackArrow
  (PB (PowerObject_on_ob P b)
     (PowerObject_on_ob P (BinProd c b))
     (Subobject_dom
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b)))) 
     (u b c)
     (Subobject_mor
        (Subobjectscategory_ob 
           (name_true b)
           (global_element_isMonic T
              (PowerObject_on_ob P b) 
              (name_true b))))) a 
  (h f) (TerminalArrow T a) 
  (g_aux c b a f): ∏ c b a : C,
C ⟦ constprod_functor1 BinProd b a, c ⟧
→ C ⟦ a, Subobject_dom (G0 b c) ⟧
b: C
∏ x : C, coreflection x (constprod_functor1 BinProd b)

  exact (exp_coreflection b).
Defined.

End Exponentials.

End Topos.
